raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue plastic bottle stands on a gray countertop. The bottle is rigid with a body suitable for grasping. STRATEGY - reach the bottle at its body for a stable grasp, lift it, and transport it to a destination (implied by the task). Failure modes include misgrasping the bottle or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach bottle body; Step 2 grasp body for secure hold; Step 3 transport to destination.**
Goal: held(blue_plastic_bottle)
Scene: blue_plastic_bottle, countertop
Step 1: reach(blue_plastic_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue plastic bottle
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_plastic_bottle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_plastic_bottle) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(blue_plastic_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue plastic bottle
  contact: holding(blue_plastic_bottle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(blue_plastic_bottle)
Step 3: transport(blue_plastic_bottle -> <destination>)
  affordance_region: an empty area at the destination
  spatial: above(blue_plastic_bottle, <destination>, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(blue_plastic_bottle)
  done_when: above(blue_plastic_bottle, <destination>, 0.05)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the blue plastic bottle
the body of the blue plastic bottle
an empty area at the destination
